profile.title: Profile
profile.subtitle: Update your personal info and display preferences.
profile.avatar_hint: Paste an image URL from Gravatar or Google Photos. Leave blank to use initials.

hero.subtitle: An interactive text-first programming space with a 24/7 AI tutor and a knowledge graph tuned to you. Deep focus, steady progress.

register.title: Create your account
register.password_hint: At least 10 characters with an uppercase letter and a number

errors.validation_failed: Some fields aren't valid. Please review them.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Try again shortly.
errors.oauth_failed: Sign-in with the external provider failed.

dashboard.subtitle: Pick a course to continue or explore a new one.
dashboard.no_courses: You haven't enrolled in any course yet. Browse the catalog to get started.

tutor.empty_hint: Ask the AI about this exercise, your compile errors or a concept you're stuck on.
tutor.auto_question: My submission failed. What should I fix?
tutor.sign_in_required: Sign in to use the AI Tutor.

lesson.no_exercise: This lesson is theory-only — no coding required.
lesson.hint_submit: Write code above then hit Submit (Ctrl/Cmd + Enter) to grade it in the sandbox.

completion.prereq_warning: The next lesson builds on a concept you may not have mastered yet — consider reviewing first.

code_block.drawer_subtitle: The AI tutor is walking through the snippet below — tokens will appear over 5–20 seconds.
code_block.failed: Could not reach the AI tutor. Try again.
code_block.sign_in_required: Sign in to use AI explain.

quiz.title: Quick self-check
quiz.subtitle: Optional — 1-2 AI-generated questions to double-check your understanding. No score pressure, retry as many times as you like.
quiz.pass_message: Nice — you've got the gist of the lesson.
quiz.low_score_message: No worries — review the lesson and try again whenever you want.
quiz.generate_failed: Quiz generation failed. Ask the teacher if this persists.
quiz.content_too_short: Lesson content is too short to generate a quiz.

complete.done_subtitle: This lesson is marked complete — feel free to move on to the next one.
complete.helper: Done reading? Tap below to save your progress — no quiz required.

onboarding.title: Welcome! Let's tailor your learning track
onboarding.subtitle: Three quick questions so the AI can recommend courses that match your goals. You can skip and fill in later.
onboarding.step1_title: What do you want to learn?
onboarding.step1_hint: Pick 1–3 goals. You can refine this list later after submitting a few exercises.

goals.cpp-foundation_desc: Compiled language — the backbone of OOP, games, systems
goals.python-basics_desc: Easy to read, great for AI / data / automation
goals.web-dev_desc: HTML / CSS / JavaScript — frontend or backend
goals.data-analysis_desc: Pandas, SQL, charts — transition into data roles
goals.algorithms_desc: Prepare for LeetCode / FAANG-style interview rounds

levels.learning-basics: Picking it up — I know basic syntax
levels.intermediate: Intermediate — I can build small apps

banner.title: Fill a 3-question survey so the AI can recommend better
banner.subtitle: Three questions — takes 30 seconds — swaps the default pick for something tailored to your goals.

catalog.title: All courses
catalog.subtitle: Pick a learning track — every lesson ships with a sandbox and AI-tutor support.
catalog.fetch_failed: Could not load the catalog. Please retry.

studio.title: My courses
studio.subtitle: Create, edit and publish your courses.
studio.empty: You haven't created any course yet.

new_course.title: New course
new_course.subtitle: Courses start as drafts. Add modules + lessons before publishing.
new_course.slug_hint: Lowercase letters, numbers and hyphens only. e.g. cpp-advanced
new_course.price_hint: Price activates once the billing flow lands in P6.

edit.confirm_delete_module: Delete module "{title}"? All lessons inside will be removed.
edit.confirm_delete_lesson: Delete lesson "{title}"? This cannot be undone.
edit.content_hint: Markdown supported: headings, lists, tables, fenced code blocks ```cpp ... ```. Shown to students on the lesson page.
edit.delete_confirm: This cannot be undone. All modules and lessons will be removed.

insights.title: Classroom insights
insights.subtitle: Qualitative signals for teachers: where students are weak, what the AI tutor is being asked, which concepts are missing.

heatmap.title: Classroom heatmap
heatmap.subtitle: Each cell is a student's BKT score on that concept. Red <40%, yellow 40–70%, green >70%.
heatmap.empty: Not enough data for a heatmap — need at least one student with submissions on a tagged concept.

tutor.title: What is the AI Tutor being asked?
tutor.subtitle: Top {limit} student questions to the AI in the last {days} days. Surfaces concepts causing confusion.
tutor.empty: No AI-tutor questions in the last {days} days.

coverage.title: Concept coverage
coverage.subtitle: This course teaches {taught} of {total} concepts in the Knowledge Graph.

wallet.title: My wallet
wallet.subtitle: Top up once, spend on any course instantly.
wallet.auto_fill_hint: Your banking app will auto-fill amount + memo.
wallet.confirm_cancel: Are you sure you want to cancel this top-up?

form.title: New top-up request
form.hint: The system generates a unique reference. Use it as your transfer memo so the admin can match fast.
form.note_placeholder: e.g. topping up for C++ advanced course…

topups.title: Top-up approvals
topups.subtitle: Verify and approve student wallet top-ups.
topups.admin_only: Only admins can view this page.
topups.confirm_approve: Confirm you've received {amount} and credit the student's wallet?

overview.title: Platform overview
overview.subtitle: Health, revenue and engagement at a glance.
overview.admin_only: Only admins can view this page.
overview.wallet_caption: Total balance currently held — amount owed if every user refunded.

users.title: User management
users.subtitle: Search, lock / unlock student and teacher accounts.
users.admin_only: Only admins can view this page.
users.confirm_lock: Lock account {email}? User will lose access immediately.

analytics.title: Course analytics
analytics.subtitle: Aggregate engagement + weakest-concept signals for this course.
